MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Tony Baldwin.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant John Waddie is present.
Attorney Erica Turcios representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAR-19-2012 is vacated.
